top_stories.title: Metro Manila Office Report Q3 2025
top_stories.summary: Metro Manila Office Report Q3 2025The Metro Manila office market in the third quarter of 2025 reflected steady adjustments to evolving workplace strategies amid tempered demand. top_stories.title: Property prices record slowest increase since Q1 2019
top_stories.summary: PDate: 3/27/2026 Content: ​ Residential property prices in the Philippines rose by 1.6 percent year-on-year (y-o-y) in Q4 2025, easing from 1.9 percent in Q3 2025. This marks the slowest pace of increase since Q1 2019, based on Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) data on the Residential Property Price Index (RPPI). By...
